title: ASM Solution 1
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2cmid","text":"Glassware should be acid-washed and rinsed well with dH2O before use. If unable to measure small quantities accurately, either scale up the recipe or prepare stock solutions of the individual compounds.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":55,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 10.595 g NaCl into the bottle.
Dissolve 1.775 g Na 2 SO 4 into the bottle.
Dissolve 0.2795 g KCl into the bottle.
Dissolve 43.1 mg Kbr into the bottle.
Dissolve 0.1145 g H 3 BO 3 into the bottle.
Dissolve 1.375 mg NaF into the bottle.
Dissolve 86.75 mg NaHCO 3 into the bottle.
Measure 500 mL dH 2 O into a 1 L glass bottle.
Mix final solution well and set aside until ready to autoclave.
creator: Christa Smith
